## Module

**Module name:**
**Registry entry:** `registry/<directory>/<file>.yaml`

## Reason

- [ ] I am the module author and want my module removed
- [ ] The source repository has been deleted or is inaccessible
- [ ] The module appears abandoned (no updates in 12+ months)
- [ ] Other (explain below)
